title: MD
biography: Mathuram Santosham is an Indian-American pediatrician who developed and promoted the Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) vaccine, which has saved millions of children's lives worldwide.
aiSummary: Mathuram Santosham is a pediatrics specialist at Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health. Based in Baltimore.

affiliations.hospitalName: Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health
